title: [Clone Firm] Warning: https://anchorageassetmanage[dot]com
text: The Financial Market Authority (FMA) Liechtenstein points out that there is no connection between the operators of the website “https://anchorageassetmanage[dot]com” and the Liechtenstein-based Anchorage Asset Management, Austrasse 15, 9495 Triesen (Registration number: FL-0002.019.743-0).   The operators of the website “https://anchorageassetmanage[dot]com” are unlawfully using the address of Anchorage Asset Management. The operators of the website do not hold any regulatory license or registration from the FMA and are therefore not authorized to provide services in Liechtenstein that require a license or registration. They are not subject to supervision by the FMA.
